context.brief_excerpt:
GOAL: Diagnose + fix Co-Exist push notifications. Currently NO push notifications fire on iOS or Android for collective chat messages. Tate said "i havent seen a single coexist push notificatio[n]". Get end-to-end push delivery working for chat messages, respecting user privacy settings.

ORIGIN: Tate verbatim 6 May 2026 20:22 AEST: "Also message notifications on iOS and android from the collective chats for all chats they're a member of that respect user privacy settings. Right now i havent see
